channel.title: Guides on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in Guides on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Scheduling Tasks
item.description: Learn how to configure and run the Plakar scheduler to automate backups.

item.title: Importing Configurations
item.description: Learn how to import configurations for stores, sources, and destinations in Plakar using the import command.

item.title: Creating a Kloset Store
item.description: Create a Kloset Store on the filesystem using Plakar.

item.title: Serving a Kloset Store over HTTP
item.description: Expose a Kloset Store over HTTP using the plakar server command.

item.title: Excluding files from a backup
item.description: Learn how to exclude files from a backup in Plakar

item.title: Retrieving secrets via external command
item.description: The passphrase for accessing an encrypted Kloset Store can be stored in the environment, a file, or in the configuration. It can also be retrieved via an external command, for example your password manager.

item.title: Logging In to Plakar
item.description: Log in to unlock optional features like pre-built package installation and alerting.

item.title: Managing packages
item.description: How to install, upgrade, and remove Plakar integration packages.

item.title: Pruning snapshots
item.description: Remove old snapshots from a Kloset store using age, tags, or retention policies.
